projectDescription: Multi-model AI agent orchestration framework for OpenCode with parallel execution, specialized agents, and advanced developer tooling
keyFeatures: Multi-model agent orchestration with 11 specialized agents (Sisyphus, Hephaestus, Prometheus, Atlas, Oracle, Librarian, Explore, and more)
Parallel background agent execution - run multiple agents simultaneously like a real dev team
Hash-anchored edit tool with LINE#ID content validation for zero stale-line errors
Category-based task delegation (visual-engineering, ultrabrain, deep, quick) with automatic model selection
LSP and AST-Grep integration for workspace refactoring, diagnostics, and pattern-aware code search
Intent Gate for true user intent classification before task execution
Ultrawork mode - one command that orchestrates everything until completion
Prometheus planning agent with interview mode for strategic task breakdown
Full Claude Code compatibility - all hooks, commands, skills, MCPs, and plugins work unchanged
46 lifecycle hooks for deep customization and workflow automation
Built-in MCPs for web search (Exa), documentation (Context7), and GitHub search (grep.app)
Skill-embedded MCP servers that spin up on-demand to preserve context budget
Tmux integration for interactive terminal sessions with REPLs and debuggers
Ralph Loop and Todo Enforcer for relentless task completion
Comment Checker to prevent AI-generated code slop
publicApiSurface: Sisyphus Agent - Main orchestrator with todo-driven workflow and parallel execution
Hephaestus Agent - Autonomous deep worker for goal-oriented execution (GPT-5.3-codex)
Prometheus Agent - Strategic planner with interview mode
Atlas Agent - Todo-list orchestrator for systematic task execution
Oracle Agent - Read-only architecture consultant for debugging and review
Librarian Agent - Multi-repo documentation and code search specialist
Explore Agent - Fast codebase exploration with contextual grep
Multimodal-Looker Agent - Visual content analysis for PDFs, images, diagrams
ultrawork / ulw command - One-command orchestration until task completion
task tool - Delegate to specialized agents by category
background_task tool - Launch agents in parallel background execution
call_omo_agent tool - Invoke specific named agents (oracle, librarian, explore)
hashline_edit tool - Hash-anchored line editing with content validation
lsp_* tools - LSP integration (rename, goto_definition, find_references, diagnostics)
ast_grep tool - Pattern-aware code search across 25 languages
interactive_bash tool - Tmux-backed interactive terminal sessions
delegate_task tool - Category-based task delegation with auto model selection
skill tool - Load domain-specific instructions and embedded MCP servers
slashcommand tool - Execute custom commands with template support
46 lifecycle hooks - Complete customization of agent behavior and workflow
Category system - 8 built-in categories (visual-engineering, ultrabrain, deep, artistry, quick, unspecified-low, unspecified-high, writing)
Background agent concurrency - Configurable parallel execution limits per provider/model
Skill-embedded MCPs - On-demand MCP server loading scoped to specific skills
/init-deep command - Generate hierarchical AGENTS.md files for codebase context
/start-work command - Execute Prometheus plans with Atlas orchestration
